sections.content: Cross Country Ski Trail Conditions as of March 6, 2026 –
Due to trail conditions Bucks Run will be closed for the season.  Thank you for a great one!

Huron Meadows Metropark (Brighton).conditions: Excellent again. Fresh groom/till this AM held up well…fast and hard. Probably another day left tomorrow since it will freeze again tonight.

Nubs Nob (Harbor Springs).conditions: The morning sweet spot for the last 3 days has been awesome . The groomers are taking full advantage of the 20 inch hardpack base .

nubsNob.liftsOpen: At least 6 chairlifts, space worm and the rope tow.
nubsNob.xcTrails: Trails will be fast with small crust this morning and will be slow and sticky by late morning. We will groom at the next hard freeze.
nubsNob.nightSkiing: Night Skiing is Tuesday thru Saturday from 5:30 to 9:00 p.m. Night skiing ends on March 14.
nubsNob.comments: Spring skiing is in store at Nub's Nob today. Expect a firm granular snow this morning that will quickly give way to soft spring snow conditions. Sunshine and a strong breeze are forecast this afternoon with a high temperature near 50 degrees. Sno Pro will be closed for a few hours this morning as we host The Bartlett Cup super G sponsored by Volkl/Marker/Dalbello The Bahnhof Park Jam is happening in the Terrain Park and should be exciting for both participants and spectators. We will not hold a NASTAR race due to the anticipated soft snow. This afternoon Two Track Mind will play outside in the Winter Garden. The soup of the day is Chicken and Rice. The lifts will spin from 9:00 a.m. to 4:30 p.m. Make it a great day at Nub's Nob.
